name: get_docs_tm_sonicstar
note: Expected divergence: vanilla 2.2.0 has no tm_sonicstar registered, so the reference returns a 'topic manager not found' error. Rust-overlay returns the contents of crates/overlay-discovery/docs/sonicstar_topic.md when sonicstar is enabled. Live parity via tests/sonicstar_live_parity.rs against sonicstar.net /api/overlay-parity/docs (step 10).
